help.title: Help & Support

faqQuestions.question: How do I reset my password?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > Account > Change Password to reset your password.

faqQuestions.question: How do I change the app language?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > General > Language and select your preferred language.

faqQuestions.question: How do I enable dark mode?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > General > Theme and select Dark or System.

faqQuestions.question: How do I export my data?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > Account Management > Export Data to download all your data.

faqQuestions.question: How do I delete my account?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > Account Management > Delete Account. This action cannot be undone.

faqQuestions.question: How do I disable notifications?
faqQuestions.answer: Go to Settings > Notifications and toggle off the notifications you want to disable.

faqQuestions.question: How is my leaderboard score calculated?
faqQuestions.answer: Visible leaderboard points are published from completed official Elmly exams. Practice, quiz, and custom modes help your learning analytics and recommendations, but they do not directly add visible leaderboard points.

help.heroSubtitle: Find quick answers or contact the Elmly support team directly.

scorePrediction.title: Predicted Exam Score
scorePrediction.disclaimerFull: This is an estimate based on your practice performance. Real exam scores may vary due to time pressure and question difficulty.
scorePrediction.notEnoughData: Practice more subjects to see your predicted score.
scorePrediction.notEnoughDataDesc: Complete at least 5 questions per subject to generate a score prediction. Keep practicing!
scorePrediction.noGroupDesc: Set your exam group in your profile to see a personalized score prediction.
scorePrediction.selectGroupFromProfile: Select your exam group from Profile to activate
scorePrediction.groupNotConfigured: This exam group is being set up. Subjects will be available soon.
scorePrediction.improvementSubtitle: Improving these subjects to 80% accuracy would gain the most points.
scorePrediction.evidenceSubtitle: The estimate weighs official exams strongest, then quizzes, then practice.
scorePrediction.improveTip: Focus on {{subject}} to boost your score
scorePrediction.unpracticedWarning: {{count}} subject(s) in your exam group have no practice data — their score is estimated as 0.
scorePrediction.howItWorksDesc: Your predicted score is calculated from distinct answered questions across official Elmly exams, quizzes, and practice. Official exams carry the strongest signal, quizzes contribute moderately, and open practice contributes conservatively so repeated or easy questions cannot inflate the estimate. Each subject is weighted by your selected exam group's coefficients and maximum points, then a 12% real-exam regression factor is applied. Confidence is based on the amount of correct evidence across your subjects.
scorePrediction.unlockDesc: Complete practice exercises for all subjects in your exam group to see your personalized score prediction.
scorePrediction.unlockTipDesc: Answer at least 15 questions correctly per subject to unlock predictions. The more you practice, the more accurate your prediction will be!

instructions.rule3Description: You can mark questions for review and come back to them later. Marked questions will be highlighted in the question palette.
instructions.rule4Description: Your progress is automatically saved every 30 seconds. If you accidentally close the app, you can resume where you left off.
instructions.rule5Description: You can submit the exam at any time before the timer runs out. Once submitted, you cannot change your answers.

topicModal.aiWillGenerate: AI will generate questions from all available topics

difficulty.adaptiveDesc: AI adjusts based on your performance

competitive.infoDescription: Test your knowledge with timed quizzes
competitive.feature1: Select subjects you want to practice
competitive.startPracticing: Start practicing to see your history
competitive.noSessionsDescription: Complete a quiz to see your session history
competitive.notEnoughQuestions: Not enough questions available. Found {{found}} questions, need {{needed}}.
competitive.unansweredQuestions: You have {{count}} unanswered question(s). Submit anyway?
competitive.exitQuizWarning: Your progress will be lost. Are you sure?

loading.title: Generating Questions
loading.subtitle: Creating {{count}} personalized {{subject}} questions
loading.info: This may take 2-3 minutes. Please be patient!
loading.tip: Questions are tailored to your weak topics for maximum learning efficiency

update.forceNote: This update is required to continue using the app

streak.practiceNow: Practice now to keep your streak!

popup.keepItUp: Keep it up! Come back tomorrow.
popup.atRisk: Practice soon to keep your streak!

celebration.newRecord: New personal record! You're on fire!
celebration.keepGoing: Amazing! Come back tomorrow to keep your streak alive.
celebration.lostMessage: Your streak was broken, but you're back! Let's build it again.

myTeachers.title: My Teachers
myTeachers.confirmRemoveMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the teacher for {{subject}}?
myTeachers.noSubjects: You are not studying any subjects yet

offline.title: You are offline
offline.message: This feature requires an internet connection. You can still practice in Standard Mode with downloaded questions.
offline.pendingSessions: {{count}} practice session(s) will sync when online
offline.downloadHint: Open this subject while online so Elmly can prepare questions for offline use.
offline.homeMessage: Connect to the internet to see your dashboard. You can still practice with downloaded questions in Standard Mode.
offline.practiceMessage: Download subjects while online to practice offline. Your progress will sync when you reconnect.
offline.competitiveMessage: Competitive mode requires an internet connection to generate AI-powered questions. Try Standard Practice mode for offline learning.
offline.teachersMessage: Connect to the internet to browse and book teachers. You can still practice with downloaded questions.
offline.analyticsMessage: Connect to the internet to view your learning analytics. You can still practice with downloaded questions.
offline.examsMessage: Mock exams require an internet connection. You can still practice with downloaded questions in Standard Mode.
offline.profileMessage: You can review account details and change local preferences. Profile edits and bookings need internet.
offline.profileActionMessage: Connect to the internet to update account details, bookings, or privacy settings.
offline.accountMessage: Connect to the internet to change your password, manage your account, export data, or delete the account.
offline.logoutPendingWarning: {{count}} offline item(s) are waiting to sync. If you log out now, make sure you reconnect and sync first if this is important.

errors.selectSpecialization: Please select at least one specialization
errors.selectGroup: Please select at least one group

verification.title: Complete Your Verification
verification.description: Upload your certificates to get verified and appear in student searches.
verification.pendingDescription: Your certificate is waiting for admin approval. You will appear in student searches after verification.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.hint: Upload PDF certificates to get verified
certificates.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this certificate?
certificates.verifiedWarning: You cannot delete certificates while your account is verified. Please contact support if you need to update your certificates.
certificates.lockedWarning: Your certificates are locked after verification. Please contact support if you need to update your documents.

goals.title: Set Your Goals
goals.setDailyGoalDesc: Track your progress and build study habits
goals.dailyQuestionsDesc: How many questions do you want to answer each day?
goals.dailyTimeDesc: How many minutes do you want to study each day?
goals.studyDaysDesc: Which days do you plan to study?
goals.studyTimeDesc: When do you prefer to study?
goals.examDateDesc: When is your exam? This helps create a study plan.
goals.savedDesc: Your daily goals have been updated.
goals.focusSubjectsDesc: These subjects are used when you build a weekly study plan. Your plan progress will only count questions from selected subjects.
goals.reminderBody: Don't forget your daily goal. Let's keep your streak going!
goals.streakBody: You've met your daily goals for {{days}} days in a row. Keep it up!
goals.progressLossMessage: You have {{progress}} questions completed for "{{subject}}". Removing this subject will reset this progress when you generate a new plan.
goals.progressLossHint: To keep your progress, select "{{subject}}" again.

studyPlan.title: Study Plan
studyPlan.noPlanDesc: Set your goals and exam date to generate a personalized study plan.
studyPlan.generatedDesc: Your personalized {{weeks}}-week study plan is ready.
studyPlan.abandonDesc: This will mark your current plan as abandoned. You can create a new one anytime.
studyPlan.personalizedDesc: Personalized study plan based on your performance

payments.refundDesc: Refund requests are processed within 3–5 business days.
payments.noHistoryDesc: Your session payments will appear here.
payments.freeTrialDesc: Payment will be required when the paid booking system activates.

validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters

validation.lastNameMin2: Last name must be at least 2 characters

validation.experienceMax50: Experience must be less than 50 years
validation.newPasswordMustDiffer: New password must be different from current password

typeDesc.firstStage: First stage: subjects and coefficients follow the group structure

teacherBuildExam.groupScoringNotice: This exam is scored according to the group structure:

teacherBuildExam.leaderboardNotice: This exam does not count toward the national leaderboard. Only Official Elmly exams affect rankings.

teacherBuildExam.countMismatchNotice: {{added}} questions added, but {{total}} required. Saving will store this as a draft.
teacherBuildExam.draftSuccessSubtitle: {{added}}/{{total}} questions added. Your exam is saved as a draft. Finish and re-submit when ready.
teacherBuildExam.successSubtitle: Your exam has been submitted for review. Students will be able to find it once an admin approves it.
teacherBuildExam.updateSuccessSubtitle: Your exam has been updated and sent for re-review.
teacherBuildExam.editNotAllowed: This exam cannot be edited. It may already be approved.

errors.badTotal: Total questions must be between 5 and 90
